examples.title: Pseudocode: Lexical Analyzer
examples.description: A simplified pseudocode representation of a lexical analyzer.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LexicalAnalyzer
INPUT: sourceCode (a stream of characters)
OUTPUT: tokens (a stream of tokens)

BEGIN
 WHILE NOT endOfFile(sourceCode) DO
 lexeme = getNextLexeme(sourceCode)
 token = getToken(lexeme)
 IF token IS NOT NULL THEN
 addTokenToStream(token)
 ELSE
 handleLexicalError(lexeme)
 END IF
 END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic operation of a lexical analyzer, including reading the source code, identifying lexemes, and producing tokens.
